ddls:
CREATE TABLE "units" (
  "unit_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each unit */,
  "unit_code" TEXT /* Code assigned to the unit */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the unit */,
  "level" TEXT /* Educational level of the unit (e.g., Entry One, Entry Two) */,
  "credits" INTEGER /* Credit value of the unit */,
  "unit_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the unit */,
  "prerequisite_unit_id" TEXT /* Unit ID of the prerequisite unit, if any */,
  "co_requisite_unit_id" TEXT /* Unit ID of the co-requisite unit, if any */,
  "academic_year" TEXT /* Academic year during which the unit is offered */,
  "term" TEXT /* Term during which the unit is offered (e.g., Fall, Spring) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the unit was created in the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the unit was last updated in the system */,
  "department_id" TEXT /* ID of the department that offers the unit */,
  "instructor_id" TEXT /* ID of the instructor who teaches the unit */,
  "max_students" INTEGER /* Maximum number of students allowed in the unit */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the unit is currently active */,
  "last_taught_date" TEXT /* Date the unit was last taught */,
  "course_catalog_link" TEXT /* Link to the unit's description in the course catalog */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("unit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_units_level FOREIGN KEY ("level") REFERENCES levels ("level_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "levels" (
  "level_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each educational level */,
  "level_name" TEXT /* Name of the educational level (e.g., Entry One, Entry Two) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the educational level */,
  "level_type" TEXT /* Type of the educational level (e.g., Undergraduate, Graduate) */,
  "credit_requirements" INTEGER /* Total credits required at this level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("level_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "unit_enrollments" (
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each enrollment */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student enrolled in the unit */,
  "unit_id" TEXT /* Unit ID of the unit the student is enrolled in */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date the student enrolled in the unit */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the enrollment (e.g., active, completed, dropped) */,
  "final_grade" TEXT /* Final grade of the student in the unit */,
  "instructor_feedback" TEXT /* Feedback provided by the instructor */,
  "audit_status" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the student is auditing the unit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("enrollment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_unit_enrollments_unit_id FOREIGN KEY ("unit_id") REFERENCES units ("unit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_unit_enrollments_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the student */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the student */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the student */,
  "program" TEXT /* Program of study the student is enrolled in */,
  "enrollment_year" TEXT /* Year the student enrolled in the program */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the student */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the student */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the student */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the student */,
  "academic_advisor_id" TEXT /* ID of the student's academic advisor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id")
)
